title: H-bridge motor driver benchmark fixture
representative_intent: DC motor driver board with H-bridge, current sense and flyback protection

requirements.text: Represent H-bridge power stage, motor connector and flyback/freewheel protection evidence.
Provide current-sense and high-current copper-width/current-density review evidence.
Connect PWM/direction control logic with fault/enable review hooks.
Attach proof-pack, KiCad, manufacturing export, current-density, thermal and benchmark coverage evidence.

non_claims: This benchmark fixture is repository coverage evidence, not motor safety approval or fabrication approval.
The fixture does not claim thermal safety, current rating adequacy, EMC, manufacturability or production readiness.
